title: Settings
configureHardware: Configure your hardware and audio quality.
speaker: Speaker
permissionsHint: Check permissions if no activity is shown.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose which alerts and sound effects Sori can use.

channelPopups.title: Channel message popups
channelPopups.description: Show popup notifications for new channel messages.

directPopups.title: Direct message popups
directPopups.description: Show popup notifications for new direct messages. Badges remain enabled.

voiceJoin.title: Voice channel join
voiceJoin.description: Play a sound when you join a voice channel.

voiceLeave.title: Voice channel leave
voiceLeave.description: Play a sound when you leave a voice channel.

newMessage.title: New message
newMessage.description: Play a sound when a new message arrives.

directCall.title: Direct call
directCall.description: Play a sound for incoming direct calls.
